since_last: 92% of 89 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +1.81%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 92% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.05% · BTC +0.62% · Gold -0.44% · Nasdaq100 -1.09%. 92% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +1.81%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +1.81%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at +1.05%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ORCL is the standout at +4.02%
cards.body: Leaders: ORCL +4.02%, AVAV +3.77%, PLTR +3.60%, AMAT +3.30%, CGNX +3.20%. Laggards: DELL -0.43%, D -0.42%, MU -0.22%, AES -0.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.60% at $155.69
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.60% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
